tariff.list.confirmEdit.title: Confirm Edit
tariff.list.confirmEdit.message: You are about to edit a hardened system rule. These rules are critical for validation integrity. Are you sure you want to proceed?
tariff.list.confirmDelete.title: Confirm Deletion
tariff.list.confirmDelete.message: You are about to delete a hardened system rule. This may compromise the validation integrity of the application. Are you absolutely sure?
tariff.header.title: Tariff Logic Editor
tariff.unmatched.title: Unmatched Units
tariff.editor.invoiceLabelHint: Optional. Shown on invoices. Defaults to rule name.
tariff.editor.ruleTypeHint: Sets the unit's role in the pricing engine.
tariff.editor.scopeSummary.base: Base price applies per matching tooth.
tariff.editor.scopeSummary.unitExtra: Extra fee applies per matching tooth and can stack.
tariff.editor.scopeSummary.jobExtra: Extra fee applies once per job, not per tooth.
tariff.editor.scopeSummary.invalid: Marks matching teeth as invalid. No price is set.
tariff.editor.scopeSummary.review: Marks matching teeth for review. No price is set.
tariff.editor.scopeSummary.ignoreUnit: Removes the unit from pricing, the invoice, the 3D viewer, and the job's pending count.
tariff.editor.triggerSummary.base: Trigger logic: each tooth is evaluated; first matching base rule by priority sets its base price/status.
tariff.editor.triggerSummary.unitExtra: Trigger logic: each matching tooth gets this extra on top of base price.
tariff.editor.triggerSummary.jobExtra: Trigger logic: if any tooth in the job matches, this extra is added once to the job total.
tariff.editor.triggerSummary.invalid: Trigger logic: each matching tooth is marked as invalid.
tariff.editor.triggerSummary.review: Trigger logic: each matching tooth is marked for review.
tariff.editor.triggerSummary.ignoreUnit: Trigger logic: each matching unit is excluded from the teeth list, invoice, 3D viewer, and the job's pending count.
tariff.editor.ruleTypeTooltip.base: Sets the base unit price. Only one base rule wins per tooth by priority.
tariff.editor.ruleTypeTooltip.unitExtra: Adds an extra fee on top of base price per tooth. Multiple extra rules can stack.
tariff.editor.ruleTypeTooltip.jobExtra: Adds a one-time extra fee at job level (not per tooth).
tariff.editor.ruleTypeTooltip.ignoreUnit: Removes the unit from the teeth list, invoice, 3D viewer, and the job's pending count. Other rules do not apply.
tariff.editor.systemRuleHint: System rules are separated and protected from accidental deletion.
tariff.item.label: Invoice Label:
